prompt: Complete the supplied small repository-native task, follow the repository's own instructions, and run its named acceptance check. Do not create a durable plan merely for Harness and do not invoke a V1 core command.
applicability: Applicable to every enrolled pilot and to Repository Harness dogfood.
acceptance_tests: The transcript contains zero V1 core commands.
No durable plan is created solely to satisfy Harness.
mandatory_failures: Any install, update, audit, scaffold, status, or version V1 core invocation occurs.
A Harness-only durable plan is created.
evidence_requirements: Prompt and ordered command transcript with exit codes.
Core-command count computed from the transcript.
Target-native acceptance output and changed-path list.
